title: Edit: For hospitals, digital transformation (DT) has become a critical capability for survival, particularly in light of…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Edit: For hospitals, digital transformation (DT) has become a critical capability for survival, particularly in light of the Covid-19 pandemic.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: Digital transformation (DT) has become an essential means of survival for hospitals, especially given the Covid-19 pandemic.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Digital transformation in healthcare has gained attention in recent years, both in academia and in practice (Kraus et al., 2021b). The importance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has been recognized, especially since the early days of the Covid 19 pandemic. Therefore, healthcare is one of the most important sectors of the industry where DT occurs  (Marques & Ferreira, 2020).

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: The significance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has been increasingly recognized in both academic and practical spheres (Kraus et al., 2021b). With the onset of the Covid-19 pandemic, the importance of digital transformation has become even more apparent, and healthcare has emerged as one of the most critical sectors where DT is taking place (Marques & Ferreira, 2020).

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: improve: Digital transformation in healthcare has gained attention in recent years, both in academia and in practice (Kraus et al., 2021b). The importance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has been recognized, especially since the early days of the Covid 19 pandemic. Therefore, healthcare is one of the most important sectors of the industry where DT occurs  (Marques & Ferreira, 2020).

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: In recent years, there has been growing interest in digital transformation in healthcare, with academic and practical communities taking notice (Kraus et al., 2021b). The urgent need for digital transformation was further highlighted by the arrival of the Covid-19 pandemic. As a result, healthcare has become one of the most crucial industries for DT implementation (Marques & Ferreira, 2020).

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: edit: Digital transformation in healthcare has gained attention in recent years, both in academia and in practice (Kraus et al., 2021b). The importance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has been recognized, especially since the early days of the Covid 19 pandemic.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: Over the past few years, digital transformation has been a prominent topic in healthcare, attracting attention from both academic and practical circles (Kraus et al., 2021b). With the onset of the Covid-19 pandemic, the significance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has become increasingly apparent.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: combine: Digital transformation in healthcare has gained attention in recent years, both in academia and in practice (Kraus et al., 2021b). The importance of digital transformation in healthcare systems has been recognized, especially since the early days of the Covid 19 pandemic.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Revised: The Covid-19 pandemic has brought attention to the critical need for digital transformation in healthcare systems, which has been a topic of interest in both academic and practical circles in recent years (Kraus et al., 2021b).
